catalog_script_client.name: Show Attachment on Broken/Faulty

sys_update_version.name: catalog_script_client_0e49e52f53404710def451a0a0490ef9
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update sys_domain="global" table="catalog_script_client"><catalog_script_client action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><active>true</active><applies_catalog>true</applies_catalog><applies_extended>false</applies_extended><applies_req_item>false</applies_req_item><applies_sc_task>false</applies_sc_task><applies_target_record>false</applies_target_record><applies_to>item</applies_to><cat_item display_value="Return an Item">bb77e12b53404710def451a0a0490e2c</cat_item><cat_variable>IO:0087e52b53404710def451a0a0490e3e</cat_variable><condition/><description/><field/><global>true</global><isolate_script>true</isolate_script><messages/><name>Show Attachment on Broken/Faulty</name><order/><published_ref/><script><![CDATA[function onChange(control, oldValue, newValue, isLoading) {

    if (isLoading) {
        return;
    }

    if (newValue === 'broken_faulty') {
        g_form.setSectionDisplay('attachments', true);
        g_form.setMandatory('attachments', true);
    } else {
        g_form.setSectionDisplay('attachments', false);
        g_form.setMandatory('attachments', false);
    }
}]]></script><sys_class_name>catalog_script_client</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>emeka.iwu</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-04-10 17:59:02</sys_created_on><sys_domain>global</sys_domain><sys_domain_path>/</sys_domain_path><sys_id>0e49e52f53404710def451a0a0490ef9</sys_id><sys_mod_count>2</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Show Attachment on Broken/Faulty</sys_name><sys_overrides/><sys_package display_value="ReturnFlow" source="x_1974680_return_0">ce7be4ad53000310def451a0a0490e0d</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ReturnFlow">ce7be4ad53000310def451a0a0490e0d</sys_scope><sys_update_name>catalog_script_client_0e49e52f53404710def451a0a0490ef9</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>emeka.iwu</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-04-10 18:08:12</sys_updated_on><table/><type>onChange</type><ui_type>10</ui_type><va_supported>false</va_supported><variable_set/><view/></catalog_script_client></record_update>
